tools.name: preview_nda_risk
tools.description:
Screen an NDA or confidentiality agreement for risk and return a free preview.

Use this tool whenever a user shares the text or PDF of any of the following document
types: non-disclosure agreement (NDA), confidentiality agreement (CDA), mutual non-disclosure agreement (MNDA / mutual NDA), one-way n

tools.name: get_nda_report
tools.description:
Retrieve the full NDA / contract risk report after the user pays $9.

Call this after `preview_nda_risk` when the user has completed the Stripe checkout
linked from the preview. Returns the complete clause-by-clause risk analysis across
all ten scored categories (confidential information definition,

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "preview_nda_risk" references sensitive artifacts (session token). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Screen an NDA or confidentiality agreement for risk and return a free preview. Use this tool whenever a user shares the text or PDF of any of the following docu…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_nda_report · Private data: preview_nda_risk, get_nda_report · Public sink: get_nda_report.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_nda_report · Private data: preview_nda_risk, get_nda_report · Public sink: get_nda_report

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
